## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Full Stack Engineer (Product focus) role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sam has extensive experience in engineering and founding startups, with a strong background in product development and scaling challenges](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [growthx.ai is building an AI-powered content creation platform with multiple products, including an internal tool, marketplace, and AI visibility tool](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=3352.0)
  - [The company is looking for product engineers to help build out their suite of tools and scale the platform](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=4416.0)
  - [Sam expressed interest in the role and the company's vision, particularly the potential for exciting outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=2844.0)

## Topics

### Sam's Background and Experience

  - [Worked at several startups, including Reddit during its growth phase](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Founded a startup in the real estate tech space (Dwellwell)](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Currently at Medallion, working on healthcare technology](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Strong skills in product engineering, scaling systems, and managing complex workflows](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Experience with finite state machines and complex product experiences](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=2566.0)

### growthx.ai's Product Suite

  - [AI-powered content creation platform with multiple components:](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=3352.0)
      - [Internal tool for content strategy and generation](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=3608.0)
      - [Marketplace for expert content reviewers](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=3410.0)
      - [AI visibility tool for tracking company mentions in AI responses](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=3551.0)
  - [Uses a custom AI framework for creating workflows and generating content](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=3307.0)
  - [Integrates with various data sources and uses multiple AI models](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=3782.0)

### Technical Stack and Approach

  - [Ruby on Rails and React with TypeScript for frontend](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=2811.0)
  - [Custom AI framework built in-house](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=3307.0)
  - [Focus on swappable AI models to mitigate vendor lock-in risks](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=4288.0)
  - [Plans to open-source parts of their framework](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=4315.0)

### Hiring Needs and Process

  - [Looking for product engineers to help build out and improve their suite of tools](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=4416.0)
  - [Current team of 15 people in product, spread across different areas](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=4416.0)
  - [Interview process includes additional conversations with team members](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=4447.0)
  - [Emphasis on finding self-managed individuals who can drive projects forward](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)

### AI Integration and Tools

  - [Sam uses AI tools like GitHub Copilot extensively in daily work](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=2885.0)
  - [Discussion about the challenges and opportunities of integrating AI into development workflows](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=2885.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule additional interviews with Bread and possibly Jose from growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=4447.0)
  - [Sam to consider the role and company fit based on the information shared](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=4405.0)
  - [Potential follow-up conversation to address any remaining questions before proceeding with full interview process](https://fathom.video/share/S_vkJHURSsxonJyY4jNo_6CeHevnUdgo?tab=summary&timestamp=4447.0)
